title: UCB — Contacts
html:
UCB Contact Map

Governing Thought

UCB's insights and analytics organization is structured along the two-franchise model (Neurology + Immunology), with separate commercial teams for each franchise and brand-level stakeholders commissioning research. ZoomRx's day-to-day contacts are at the brand manager and associate director level, with directors controlling budget and scope decisions. The contact map below reflects names identified from SharePoint project folders, proposals, and deliverable metadata. Working-style notes are included where institutional knowledge exists — blank fields indicate contacts not yet characterized.

Organization Structure

Contact details are currently limited to what has been extracted from SharePoint project documentation. A comprehensive org chart should be built through proposal review and stakeholder mapping conversations.

UCB US Commercial Organization (Partial — from project documentation)
  |
  |--- Immunology (Bimzelx)
  |      |--- Dermatology commercial team
  |      |--- Rheumatology commercial team
  |
  |--- Neurology
  |      |--- Epilepsy (Briviact, Fintepla, Nayzilam)
  |      |--- Neuromuscular (Rystiggo, Zilbrysq)
  |
  |--- Patient Evidence (Emmanuel Caeymaex, EVP — from Jan 2026)
  |--- Commercial (Fiona du Monceau, EVP & CCO — from Jan 2026)

Tier 1: Day-to-Day Contacts

Immunology — Bimzelx

Name Title Email Working Style
TBD — to be populated from Bimzelx Derm PET and Rheum PET project documentation — — —

Neurology — Epilepsy

Name Title Email Working Style
TBD — to be populated from Fintepla PET and Briviact project documentation — — —

Neurology — gMG

Name Title Email Working Style
TBD — to be populated from gMG HCP-Pt project documentation — — —

Tier 2: Decision Makers & Influencers

Senior Leadership (from public sources)

Name Title Context
Jean-Christophe Tellier CEO (since 2014) Long-tenured CEO; unlikely to interact directly with ZoomRx but sets strategic direction
Fiona du Monceau EVP & Chief Commercial Officer (from Jan 2026) Previously EVP Patient Evidence; now leads all commercial operations. Rotation from evidence role suggests deep appreciation for data-driven commercial decisions
Emmanuel Caeymaex EVP, Head of Patient Evidence (from Jan 2026) Previously CCO; now leads Patient Evidence function. This is the executive most likely to influence MR vendor decisions at enterprise level

Tier 3: Adjacent Stakeholders

To be populated as engagement deepens. Key adjacencies to map:

  • Field medical leadership (MSL directors) — relevant for MEE expansion
  • Sales leadership by franchise — relevant for PET readout attendance
  • Market access / patient services — relevant for FRM work

Contact Map Enrichment Priority

The UCB contact map is the thinnest of any active account. Immediate priorities:

  1. Extract contacts from active project kick-off decks — Bimzelx Derm PET and Rheum PET KO decks in SharePoint contain client attendee lists, titles, and emails
  2. Review proposals/SOWs — project folder 002 Commercial _ Account Agreements contains account agreements with contact information
  3. Map the Patient Evidence organization — Emmanuel Caeymaex's team is the most likely enterprise buyer. Understanding his direct reports and their brand responsibilities is critical for expansion.

Back to Accounts Hub | Home
